flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Atlantic University fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (30.3% → 22.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Atlantic University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.9k → $8.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Atlantic University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.9k → $8.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Atlantic University rose 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($4.6k → $5.5k).
